rationale: Renamed the contradictory non-interference wording in the acceptance criteria to Movement overlay interference bug class.
Updated acceptance scenario 3 to describe the Movement overlay interference bug class.
Updated FR-003 to require regression coverage for the Movement overlay interference bug class.
Added the -w flag to the T006 ripgrep command for whole-word API matching.
Added the -w flag to the quickstart ripgrep command for whole-word API matching.
Addressed the review summary by updating the contradictory bug-class wording and both ripgrep commands.
